# PuSnackbarHost

## Intent

- snackbar host
- toast queue
- notification stack

## Prefer When

- Use for application-managed snackbar queues with fixed positioning and max visible items.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for a single inline notification embedded in page content; use PuInlineNotice.

## Import

```ts
import { PuSnackbarHost } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

## Props

- `items`
- `position`
- `maxVisible`
- `defaultDuration`
- `pauseOnHover`
- `ariaLabel`

## Slots

- No slots extracted.

## Events

- `update:items`
- `close`
- `action`

## Composition

- PuSnackbar

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/overlay/PuSnackbar.story.vue`

- Basic
- Controlled
- Tones
- Host Queue

## Types

- `PuSnackbarActionPayload`
- `PuSnackbarClosePayload`
- `PuSnackbarHostPosition`
- `PuSnackbarId`
- `PuSnackbarItem`

## Caveats

- Uses items and update:items for queue control; do not assume an imperative toast service is included.

- `src/components/puSnackbar/puSnackbarHost.vue`
